kernel_subject: net: split out SIOCDEVPRIVATE handling from dev_ioctl
stage1_reason: Driver changed from ndo_do_ioctl to ndo_siocdevprivate callback in net_device_ops, adapting to kernel API evolution for private ioctl handling.
stage2_reason: Driver commit changes ndo_do_ioctl to ndo_siocdevprivate, matching kernel commit that splits SIOCDEVPRIVATE handling from dev_ioctl and introduces ndo_siocdevprivate callback.
